message:
style(main): drop leading underscore from sync_lock binding

The binding was named _sync_lock as a gesture toward "might be
unused on the if-None branch," but in both branches of the match
we bind to Option<File> and then branch on .is_some() — it's
always read. Rust's convention is that _prefix means "deliberately
unused," and tooling (clippy, rust-analyzer) treats it as such,
hiding it from the "unused variable" audit in ways that can mask
real unused-binding bugs. Renamed to sync_lock; the comment that
narrates its drop point was updated to match.
